meta.description: MiroFish - Social Media Opinion Simulation System
meta.title: MiroFish - Predict Anything

home.tagline: A Simple & Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine
home.descPart2: can extract real-world seeds to auto-generate a parallel world of up to
home.descPart3: . Inject variables from a God's-eye view and find the
home.slogan: Rehearse the future in agent swarms, win decisions after countless simulations
home.statusDesc: Prediction engine standing by. Upload unstructured data to initialize the simulation sequence
home.step01Desc: Seed extraction & Individual/collective memory injection & GraphRAG construction
home.step02Desc: Entity relation extraction & Persona generation & Agent config injection
home.step03Desc: Dual-platform parallel simulation & Auto-parse prediction needs & Dynamic temporal memory
home.step04Desc: ReportAgent with rich toolset for deep interaction with post-simulation environment
home.step05Desc: Chat with any agent in the simulated world & Chat with ReportAgent
home.promptPlaceholder: // Describe your simulation or prediction needs in natural language (e.g. What public opinion trends would emerge if a university reversed a disciplinary decision?)

history.title: Simulation History
history.playbackHint: Step 3 "Simulation" and Step 5 "Interaction" must be started in real-time and cannot be replayed from history

graphPanel.hintSimulation: GraphRAG long/short-term memory updating in real time
graphPanel.hintFinished: Some content is still processing. You may refresh the graph manually later.

step1.ontologyDesc: LLM analyzes document content and simulation needs, extracts real-world seeds, and auto-generates an appropriate ontology structure
step1.graphBuildDesc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are auto-chunked and sent to Zep to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations to form temporal memory and community summaries
step1.buildCompleteDesc: Graph construction is complete. Proceed to set up the simulation environment.

step2.initDesc: Create a new simulation instance and pull simulation world parameter templates
step2.profileDesc: Combining context, auto-invoke tools to comb entities and relations from the knowledge graph, initialize simulation individuals, and assign them unique behaviors and memories based on real-world seeds
step2.configDesc: LLM intelligently configures world time flow, recommendation algorithms, each individual's active periods, posting frequency, event triggers, and more based on simulation needs and real-world seeds
step2.activationDesc: Based on narrative direction, auto-generate initial activation events and trending topics to guide the initial state of the simulated world
step2.readyDesc: Simulation environment is ready. You can start running the simulation.
step2.roundSettingsDesc: MiroFish auto-plans simulation of {hours} real-world hours, each round represents {minutes} minutes of real time
step2.estimatedTime: If Agent count is 100: Estimated ~{minutes} minutes
step2.autoEstimate: If Agent count is 100: Estimated {minutes} minutes
step2.firstRunTip: If this is your first run, we strongly recommend switching to 'Custom' mode to reduce rounds for a quick preview and to lower error risk
step2.fullExperienceDesc: Complete behavioral trajectory in this event
step2.behaviorProfileDesc: Summary of experience and behavioral style preferences
step2.startSimAuto: Starting simulation, using auto-configured rounds: {n} rounds
step2.startGeneratingConfig: Starting to generate dual-platform simulation config...

step3.oldLogsCleared: Old simulation logs cleared, restarting simulation

step5.tabAgent: Chat with any individual in the world
step5.toolsCardSubtitle: A quick conversational version of the report generation agent, equipped with 4 professional tools and full MiroFish memory
step5.toolInsightForgeDesc: Aligns real-world seed data with simulation environment state, combining Global/Local Memory mechanism for cross-spatiotemporal deep attribution analysis
step5.toolPanoramaSearchDesc: Breadth-first traversal algorithm based on graph structure, reconstructing event propagation paths and capturing full information flow topology
step5.toolQuickSearchDesc: Instant query interface based on GraphRAG, optimized indexing efficiency for fast extraction of specific node attributes and discrete facts
step5.toolInterviewAgentDesc: Autonomous interviewing capability that conducts multi-round parallel conversations with simulated individuals, collecting unstructured opinions and psychological states
step5.chatEmptyReport: Chat with Report Agent to explore report content in depth
step5.chatEmptyAgent: Chat with simulated individuals to learn their perspectives
step5.surveyPlaceholder: Enter the question you want to ask all selected targets...

views.simEnvRunning: Simulation environment detected running, shutting down...
views.simRunning: Simulation status detected as running, stopping...
views.prepareBackStep2: Preparing to return to Step 2, shutting down simulation...
views.timeConfigFailed: Failed to get time config, using default: {minutes} min/round

process.ontologyHint: Graph construction will start automatically after generation
process.ontologyApiDesc: After uploading documents, LLM analyzes the content and auto-generates an ontology structure suitable for opinion simulation (entity types + relation types)
process.graphApiDesc: Based on the generated ontology, document chunks are sent to Zep API to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations
process.waitingOntologyComplete: Waiting for ontology generation to complete...
